com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXAttributeSetter

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPropertySetter

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXAttributeSetter
extends IXPropertySetter
    Interface for storing attribute/property changes to be applied to an object. This object can be obtained from an IXWriteableObject. Any change stored in this object is not applied until the IXAction.execute() exits returning 'true'.

    The last operation you decide to perform on an attribute or property is the only operation that will be applied. If in the IXAction.execute() method, you add a property, then later decide to remove it, the property will be removed when IXAction.execute() exits returning 'true'. Conversely, if you remove a property, then later decide to change its value, this time the property value will be changed when the IXAction.execute() exits returning 'true'.

    See Also:
    IXAction, IXWriteableObject

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addAttribute(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String value)
      Used in custom actions to modify an attribute of an object.
      java.util.Collection<IXValue> getAttributes()
      Get a Collection of the attibutes on the object of this result

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPropertySetter

        addProperty, getProperties, getPropertiesToBeRemoved, removeProperty

    • Method Detail

      • addAttribute

        void addAttribute(java.lang.String name,
                  java.lang.String value)
        Used in custom actions to modify an attribute of an object. This replaces any previously added attribute of the same name with the new value. If the attribute doesn't exist on the object, no action is taken.
        Parameters:
        name - - of attribute
        value - - of attribute (always a String)

      • getAttributes

        java.util.Collection<IXValue> getAttributes()
        Get a Collection of the attibutes on the object of this result
        Returns:
        a collection of the attributes on this result if any exist, an empty Collection otherwise.
